# Routed VLAN (SVI) Interface
-- vlans/vlan-10 --
apiVersion: networking.metal.ironcore.dev/v1alpha1
kind: VLAN
metadata:
  name: vlan-10
  namespace: default
spec:
  deviceRef:
    name: device
  id: 10
  name: VLAN10
-- interfaces/svi-10 --
apiVersion: networking.metal.ironcore.dev/v1alpha1
kind: Interface
metadata:
  name: svi-10
  namespace: default
spec:
  deviceRef:
    name: device
  name: vlan10
  description: SVI for VLAN 10
  adminState: Up
  type: RoutedVLAN
  mtu: 1500
  vlanRef:
    name: vlan-10
  ipv4:
    addresses:
      - 192.168.10.254/24
-- state --
{
  "openconfig-interfaces:interfaces": {
    "interface": [
      {
        "name": "vlan10",
        "config": {
          "description": "SVI for VLAN 10",
          "enabled": true,
          "mtu": 1500,
          "name": "vlan10",
          "type": "iana-if-type:l3ipvlan"
        },
        "openconfig-vlan:routed-vlan": {
          "config": {
            "vlan": 10
          }
        },
        "subinterfaces": {
          "subinterface": [
            {
              "config": {
                "enabled": true,
                "index": 0
              },
              "index": 0,
              "openconfig-if-ip:ipv4": {
                "addresses": {
                  "address": [
                    {
                      "config": {
                        "ip": "192.168.10.254",
                        "prefix-length": 24,
                        "type": "PRIMARY"
                      },
                      "ip": "192.168.10.254"
                    }
                  ]
                },
                "config": {
                  "enabled": true
                }
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}
